title: Welcome to the Presidio National Park Site (San Francisco)
content: Discover trails, food, picnicking, and unbeatable views of the Golden Gate Bridge in the Presidio. multiple couples and a dog having a picnic at Battery Bluffs with the Golden Gate Bridge in the background. Experience unforgettable views of the Golden Gate Bridge around the Presidio of San Francisco. title: Presidio San Francisco Guide (From a Local Who Visits Often)
content: Jill on a windy day at the Golden Gate Bridge. The Presidio in San Francisco is one of my favorite places to explore the outdoors, while still being in the city. You'll often find me out and about on one of its trails or soaking in the views of the Golden Gate Bridge from one of its many viewpoints. Tunnel Tops Park, one of the newest additions to this former army base, is a great place to spend time with family, grab a bite to eat, or just hang out and enjoy the views of the bridge. Today, I'm going to tell you more about the Presidio so you can decide if it's a place you want to explore during your visit. The Presidio in San Francisco is a **former military base** on the northwest side of the city. The San Francisco Presidio offers **amazing views** of the Golden Gate Bridge, the SF Bay, and beyond.
